comment: This file defines verification logic for Zig data ingestion, tracking errors, warnings, and report metrics using a custom allocator and mapper.

members.name: IngestionErrorKind
members.comment: Represents an ingestion error during data handling; manages fixed buffers with strict ownership and invariants.

members.name: IngestionWarningKind
members.comment: Tracks ingestion events with a fixed-size buffer; managed by the owner; not thread-safe.

members.name: IngestionReport
members.comment: Manages ingestion report data with ownership transfer; ensures proper cleanup and error handling.

members.name: VerifierConfig
members.comment: Manages verification configuration with fixed buffers; owned by the verifier; ensures invariant state.

members.name: Verifier
members.comment: Manages verification logic for Zig verification; owns allocator and config; provides init, verifyMapper, and verifyStats methods with strict ownership and invariants.

members.name: init
members.signature: fn init(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, config: VerifierConfig) -> Verifier

members.name: verifyMapper
members.signature: fn verifyMapper(self: *Verifier, mapper: *const TripleMapper, report: *IngestionReport) -> void
members.comment: Verify mapper state (before flush) for basic integrity.

members.name: verifyStats
members.signature: fn verifyStats(self: *Verifier, triples: usize, nodes: usize, edges: usize, report: *IngestionReport) -> void

members.name: verify mapper with labelled nodes - no warnings
verify mapper missing label generates warning
